notes:
First public release of Ember — the AI agent for your Mac and PC.

• Sees the screen with on-device OCR (Apple Vision / Windows OCR) and clicks exact on-screen text
• Gemini (free) + Claude Opus 4.8 with adaptive thinking and streaming
• Real browser control, file management, shell, and system diagnostics
• Ember Link: drive your computer from your phone over Wi-Fi
• Hands-free voice chat
• Confirms before destructive commands, data sending, and risky key-combos
• Background auto-update on both macOS and Windows
